title: Immortalers Delight
description: Ancient plants, ancient tools, and the expansion of ancient diets!
body:
# 📖Description
This mod will be a feast for archaeology enthusiasts and fans of Farmer's Delight. It will present you with a variety of ancient crops from an alternate MC universe, each discovered by sniffing beasts in different biomes! 
Each ancient crop had its own unique characteristics, with different cultivation methods and ingredients used to create fascinating delicacies. 
Stewing? Detoxifying? The ancient secrets of plants are far more than just these! 
In conclusion, do not forget about tradition and fantasy.
# 📦 New Content
- Abandoned Plains Residence: A small ruin formed on the plains, where you can obtain ancient wooden blocks. It contains multiple suspicious gravel pieces, and there is a chance to obtain a Sniffer Egg. 
- The ever-blooming cherry tree: In the medium-sized ruins generated in forest, coniferous forest, etc., Sniffer Eggs can be obtained stably.
## New crop
- Evolutcorn: A common-sized crop, its seeds were obtained by Sniffer through digging in the plain and can be planted on farmland. 
- Pearlip: A three-row high fruit tree. Its seeds were obtained by Sniffer from digging in the jungle and can be planted on soil-type blocks. 
- Himekaido: A low-growing shrub plant that can develop into a tall Hibonberry tree. Its seeds were obtained by Sniffer during his forest exploration and can be planted on farmland. The Hibonberry fruits produced by it contain miraculous powers. 
- Leisamboo: A two-stacked aquatic plant. Its seeds were obtained by Sniffer from digging in the river and can be planted on a soil-like block one grid below the water surface. 
- Kwat Wheat: A dangerous cereal and legume composite plant. Its seeds were obtained by Sniffer from the Crimson Forest. They can be planted on farmland, soul sand, and soul soil. After maturing, they will release a lethal gas. 
- Alfalfa: A herbaceous plant. Sniffer has a certain probability of obtaining its seeds when digging in any terrain and it can be planted on farmland. 
- Warped Laurel: This herbaceous plant can be used as a spice. Its seeds were obtained by Sniffer from the eerie forest and can be planted on farmland.
## New Food
- Over a hundred kinds of various delicacies, ranging from Chinese to Western, ordinary to exotic, are all available here. 
- There are dozens of various beverages, including drinks, tea, and fine wines. Each one has its own unique flavor. Welcome to enjoy them.
## New equipment
- Eternal Blade: Rusty ancient blade, newly sharpened ancient blade; 
- Highly durable sniffing animal hair brush, and grain scents that attract the sniffing animals to follow. 
- Ancient ships carrying scent-sniffing animals and ancient covered boats with 54 storage spaces
## New model
- Power Battle Mode: Significantly enhances the Buff effects, suitable for integration packs that include additional cultivation content such as accessories and skill trees.
## Misc
- New devices: Enchantal Cooler for preparing food, Ancient Stove for providing heat sources; 
- Various decorative blocks made from jin haitang wood, pearl-shaped palm shell, ancient wood, and stream bamboo. 
- Eighteen new enhancement effects and five negative effects have been added. 
- All beverages can be placed by right-clicking.
# 📃FAQ
Q: Can this Mod be used in the Mod Pack? 
A: Of course! You can add "Immortalers Delight" to the integration package. 
Q: Will this module be updated for other game versions? 
A: At present, there are no specific plans. We should prioritize the expansion and improvement of the content.
